item.title: Prime minister Anthony Albanese announces crackdown on gambling in bid to reduce exposure to harms
item.description: ‘What we don’t want is kids growing up thinking that footy and gambling are the same thing.’

item.title: Matildas issue explosive statement on Asian Cup prize money after request to work with AFC ‘ignored’
item.description: Players have been quietly seething for months and refused to stay silent any longer.

item.title: Sam Kerr’s reported move to NWSL upstart Denver Summit FC revealed hours after Chelsea’s Champions League exit
item.description: The Matildas captain is leaving England for a new start with a high-profile club.

item.title: DNA testing confirms Ted Bundy killed Utah teen Lauran Ann Aime in 1974 cold case
item.description: After more than 50 years, an unsolved murder of a Utah teenager has been linked to the serial killer.

item.title: Australia faces ‘sharp recession’ if US escalates Middle East war
item.description: If US President Donald Trump continues the war, Australians may see a bigger financial crisis.

item.title: Police release body-cam footage of stunned Tiger Woods: ‘I’m being arrested?’
item.description: The vision shows the legendary golfer doing an embarrassing sobriety test, as detectives empty his pocket.

item.title: President Donald Trump fires US Attorney General Pam Bondi after bungled release of Epstein files
item.description: A former personal lawyer of Trump’s will now lead the Justice Department.

item.title: Daniel Ricciardo clears air on end of Formula 1 career and fading form: ‘I lost a little something’
item.description: The Aussie driver’s pain is still there for everyone to see .. and now he’s revealed all.

item.title: Sarah Ferguson hit with major $3 million rejection as her desperation amid Andrew shame worsens
item.description: Former duchess Sarah Ferguson has been hit with a million-dollar rejection as the fallout from the Epstein files continues.

item.title: Embarrassing Gmail address? Now you can change it as Google introduces account adjustments
item.description: ‘2004 was a good year, but your Gmail address doesn’t need to be stuck in it.’

item.title: Russia conducts rolling aerial attack on Ukraine as war continues
item.description: The country is using a new tactic as Moscow tries to bypass Ukrainian air defences.

item.title: Artemis II astronauts capture Earth's blue beauty in stunning photos released by NASA
item.description: The Artemis II crew will become the world’s most remote travellers as they swing around the moon.

item.title: The top myths about cancer: We separate fact from fiction
item.description: While some misconceptions are harmless, others can hold you back from prevention.

item.title: 7NEWS The Issue Podcast: Fuel tax slash could backfire and cost billions as an expert warns of debt and inflation
item.description: An economist is warning the fuel excise cut was a $2.5 billion ‘mistake’.

item.title: Legendary trainer Peter Moody emotional after superstar filly Sheza Alibi wins Doncaster Mile
item.description: ‘I’ve been blessed to train one of the greatest we have ever seen, but this filly is just amazing.’

item.title: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese’s Easter Sunday message about time of ‘reflection’ and ‘joy’ amid Middle East war
item.description: ‘I wish you all a wonderful Easter.’

item.title: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor scandal: William and Kate make ‘determined’ move to avoid Beatrice and Eugenie
item.description: The Prince and Princess of Wales have made a shock ‘determined move’ to avoid Princesses Beatrice and Eugenie.

item.title: Tim Tszyu defies monster cut to defeat Denis Nurja as mega world title fight against Errol Spence Jr beckons
item.description: The Aussie star needed medical attention immediately after celebrating another career-boosting win.

item.title: Aussie legend Brian Goorjian leads Sydney Kings to dramatic NBL championship over Adelaide 36ers
item.description: The fiery grand final series went all the way down to overtime in the Easter Sunday decider.

item.title: Unpopular opinion: Why camping isn’t the relaxing escape and connection with nature it promises
item.description: No sleep, no comfort and somehow more work than home, yet people keep going back.

item.title: Australian Idol and Nova FM host Ricki-Lee Coulter reveals health struggle
item.description: The 40-year-old has spoken about a ‘pretty messed up’ issue.

item.title: TV star Grant Denyer and Richard Barram hospitalised after horrific three-car crash at Bathurst 6 Hour
item.description: Two drivers involved in the collision were taken to separate hospitals with injuries.

item.title: How a US soldier was saved after two days in Iran
item.description: The weapon’s expert was forced to eject from a damaged fighter jet on Friday.

item.title: Avoid Telstra and Optus’ mobile plan price hikes with these cheap providers
item.description: Phone bills are about to get more expensive — but you don’t have to pay more.

item.title: Savannah Guthrie speaks on faith in Easter message as search for Nancy Guthrie continues in Tucson, Arizona
item.description: US TV host Savannah Guthrie delivered an unusually candid Easter message as the search for her missing mother continues ahead of her return to screen.

item.title: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor spotted alone on Easter at Sandringham Estate as royals attend service
item.description: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor’s brutal fall from grace was on full display on Easter Sunday, with the former prince looking tired, startled and alone with dilated pupils.

item.title: ‘Where is Jessica?’ TikTok trend takes off, showing parents how to stop a toddler tantrum
item.description: ‘I actually can’t believe this worked’.

item.title: Bruce Willis’ daughter Rumer Willis hits back at critics with video of her breastfeeding 3yo daughter
item.description: Rumer Willis, the daughter of Bruce Willis and Demi Moore, has hit back at critics on Instagram after posting a video of herself breastfeeding her three-year-old daughter.

item.title: Russian attack kills three in Odesa, including toddler
item.description: The child was one of three people killed in Odesa, while Ukraine targeted a key Russian oil port.

item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: NASA’s Artemis II astronauts break 56-year-old record for distance from Earth
item.description: The crew will be plunged into darkness and communications blackouts as they fly around the moon.

item.title: Aussie golf ace Jason Day takes aim at ‘selfish’ hero Tiger Woods after DUI charge
item.description: ‘It just shows the human element of someone that is struggling with some sort of an addiction.’

item.title: ‘Painless’ needle-free flu vaccine for kids released for free under New South Wales Nasal Spray Influenza Vaccination Program
item.description: The painless option is offered amid a spike in hospital admissions and waning faith in the vaccine.

item.title: Army reservist charged after allegedly working as a drone operator for Ukraine during war with Russia
item.description: The 25-year-old faces a maximum penalty of 20 years in prison.

item.title: TV star Grant Denyer shares health update after Bathurst 6 Hour crash
item.description: The charismatic presenter and game-show host was involved in a three-car collision.

item.title: Ben Roberts-Smith charged over war crime murder allegations
item.description: The 47-year-old former war hero had been under investigation for five years.

item.title: ATO rolls out in-app call verification to help Australians spot scams as tax time fraud surges
item.description: Scams peak during tax season with almost 7500 impersonation frauds reported in last July alone.

item.title: Olympic cyclist Rohan Dennis speaks out after ‘tone-deaf’ social media post causes backlash following death of wife Melissa Hoskins
item.description: ‘I loved Melissa and the last thing I ever wanted was to hurt her.’

item.title: Travellers on alert as twin cyclones threaten multiple South Pacific islands
item.description: Tourists are advised to check how flights and travel plans will be impacted.

item.title: Hawthorn coach Sam Mitchell makes shock manager switch to Craig Hutchison’s Bravo Management
item.description: The surprise move follows Zach Merrett’s split with Tom Petroro earlier this year.

item.title: Aussie cricket great David Warner charged with drink driving
item.description: The 39-year-old allegedly stopped before the testing site, and then blew over double the legal limit.

item.title: Police investigating suspected vandalism at Essendon headquarters
item.description: Officials returned to the club to find grass had been burnt with an estimated five-figure sum of damage.

item.title: AFL ‘not happy’ as fresh vision uncovers umpire error in final quarter of Fremantle’s win over Adelaide
item.description: It’s the latest in a growing list of mistakes that have gone against Adelaide in close games.

item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: ASIC eliminates 12,000 dodgy scam sites, issues warning over evolving online threat
item.description: Authorities are killing an average of 32 dodgy websites a day but the fight is far from over.

item.title: Socceroos World Cup hero Mitch Duke announces retirement: ‘It’s time’
item.description: ‘I don’t want to die wondering. This is my last chance.’

item.title: Kanye West refused entry into UK over past antisemitism prompting cancellation of London’s Wireless Festival
item.description: The rapper ‘should never have been invited to headline’, the UK prime minister said.

item.title: How to stash up to $200k into your nest egg by downsizing, without leaving your suburb
item.description: New research shows where downsizers can gain the most.

item.title: Melbourne families drowning in rubbish as council workers strike for pay rise
item.description: Thousands of families are struggling with rotting waste as a bitter council fight takes a nasty turn.

item.title: Stunning first-ever photographs of the dark side of the moon sent back to Earth by NASA’s Artemis II astronauts on lunar mission
item.description: It is the first time humans have seen the far side of the moon with their own eyes — here is what they captured.

item.description: The ceasefire also includes attacks on Lebanon.

item.title: Heartbreaking loss behind Parramatta rookie Apa Twidle’s stunning NRL debut
item.description: “When I went to my mum (after full-time), we didn’t even say anything, we just started crying.’

item.title: Brisbane rideshare driver charged over alleged stalking, sexual assault and coercive control involving multiple women
item.description: Police say he contacted the women through social media after their trips before his behaviour allegedly escalated into threats and assault.

item.description: The news comes two years after the filly made worldwide headlines.

item.title: Jackie O allegedly complained multiple times about co-host Kyle Sandilands before on-air fight
item.description: Henderson and her former co-host Kyle Sandilands are each suing their radio bosses over the end of their multi-million-dollar contracts.

item.description: The 28-year-old’s solicitor asked the court to vary the bail conditions and remove a night-time curfew.

item.description: ‘You’re totally hypocritical.’

item.description: A new report shows where investors can find surprising yields.

item.description: ‘I was just overwhelmed by the gesture.’

item.description: More than 13,000 drivers are being urged to take their car back to the manufacturer.

item.description: Consumers who bought the affected sunscreens are urged to stop using them.

item.description: The devastating strain reached Antarctica from South America in 2023 and has caused mass sea bird deaths and killed seals.

item.description: Police believe it was a case of mistaken identity.

item.description: Harmony Bryant died weeks after she was found covered in fractures in a burning car. Authorities say it was no accident.

item.description: Australians lost more than $2 billion to scams in 2025.

item.description: The cuts are expected to save the bank at least $65 million a year.

item.title: Michael J. Fox responds to report of his death: ‘WTF?’
